name: ai-video
description: Multimodal Content Compiler — compiles topic + style reference into production-ready video via 15-pass compilation pipeline

scripts.dev:electron:ui: node -e "const u='http://127.0.0.1:5173';const t=Date.now();(function p(){fetch(u).then(()=>process.exit(0)).catch(()=>Date.now()-t>6e4?process.exit(1):setTimeout(p,300));})();" && AI_VIDEO_UI_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm run dev:electron
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n UI,DESKTOP -c cyan,green "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:electron:ui"
scripts.typecheck:workspaces: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/lib/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pipeline-core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pipeline-video/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/adapter-common/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/site-strategies/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/server/tsconfig.json
scripts.package:electron: npm run build:sidecar && npm run package --workspace @ai-video/app-desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:workspaces && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-video/app-ui-shell
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck:workspaces && npm run lint --workspace @ai-video/app-ui-shell
scripts.ci:verify: npm run lint:deps:diff -- --skip-security && npm run check:package-imports && npm run check:route-sanitize && npm run check:src-shims && npm run check:src-routes-shims && npm run check:src-adapters-shims && npm run build && npm run check:strict-progress && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-video/app-ui-shell && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-video/app-desktop && npm test
